refs.summary: Adds RuntimeManagedSessionSnapshot, session cards, replay summary, product-lane entries, screenshot persistence metadata, and durable managed-session control records.
Projects managed sessions from persisted computer-use parent playbook runs and standalone browser tool state.
Normalizes observe/take-over/return state, browser/local/desktop kinds, waiting-for-user reasons, screenshot quarantine, replay readiness, and product-safe lane entries.
Adds the managed-session control state key namespace.
Imports managed-session snapshot and control-state projection into the bridge.
Includes managed_sessions in inspect_thread output beside trajectory, policy leases, stop hooks, delegation, brain, and substrate state.
Adds observe_session, take_over_session, and return_agent managed-session control actions that persist daemon-owned runtime state.
Adds bridge proof that a login-gated browser child session projects as waiting_for_user, quarantines screenshots, and survives take-over control transition.
